name: Weather MCP Server
description: Provides weather information using the free and open-source Open-Meteo API. No API key required.
longDescription: Provides current weather, weather forecasts for a datetime range, air quality reports, and timezone conversion tools using the free and open-source Open-Meteo API. Supports stdio, SSE, and Streamable HTTP transports.
author: isdaniel
examplePrompts: What is the current weather in Tokyo?
Get weather forecast for Paris next week
How is the air quality in Beijing today?
